name: Victoria Wood
blurb: Victoria Wood was an English comedian, actress, singer and writer who began her career by winning the talent show New Faces in 1974.
bio: Victoria Wood was an English comedian, actress, singer and writer who began her career by winning the talent show New Faces in 1974. She became one of Britains most popular stand-up comics in the 1980s, interspersing her act with her own comic songs performed at the piano. She won multiple BAFTAs for her sketch and live work and wrote dozens of sketches, plays and sitcoms.

timeline.ev: Wins the talent show New Faces
Victoria Wood: As Seen on TV begins
Wins a BAFTA for As Seen on TV
An Audience with Victoria Wood wins a second BAFTA
Live show filmed at the Royal Albert Hall

accolades: BAFTA TV Award for Victoria Wood: As Seen on TV (1986)
BAFTA for An Audience with Victoria Wood (1988)

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: Two embeddable official stand-up clips verified, below the 3-clip minimum. (1) ITV's official channel (@itv) hosts a clip from 'An Audience with Victoria Wood'(1988) — one of her logged appearances. (2) Pozzitive Comedy (@PozzitiveComedy) — the official YouTube channel of Pozzitive Television, Victoria Wood's own production company (Geoff Posner/David Tyler, who produced 36+ of her programmes; they filmed her 1997 Swan Theatre stand-up tour) — hosts 'Still Standing - Baby Boom', a stand-up musical bit. Both authors verified via oembed. Wood died in 2016; her catalogue largely predates official YouTube. Other YouTube copies of her work (As Seen on TV, Live in Your Own Home 1994, Sold Out, An Audience 1988) are fan/VHS-rip re-uploads (channels: ZYXWV9876543210, tv heaven, ang's archive, ppotter, Victoria Wood Appreciation Society, Paulus, All British Comedy Explained, Tom Pinnock, etc.) — all rejected. No official website/social (deceased). Honest gap.

bits.yt_title: An Audience With...Victoria Wood | Legendary Comic Smashes Her Performance
